evals.prompt: Draft a Jira ticket to fix CODEOWNERS because the Emmy PR Review Process governance doc now depends on it.
evals.expected_behavior: Read the governance source and repo evidence, load base Jira engineering and ATO traceability references, search Jira for overlap, apply engineering plus governance/ATO labels, use Ready for Refinement sprint placement if the follow-up is rough, and present a draft payload without writing to Jira.

evals.prompt: Create follow-up tickets from this CM-03 governance decision, but show me the payloads first.
evals.expected_behavior: Classify the governance-driven follow-up work, load the shared ATO traceability reference, include emmy_ato plus control family and control ID labels, and ask for approval before any Jira writes.

evals.prompt: This approved governance page is missing its next review date. Make a Jira follow-up for that cleanup.
evals.expected_behavior: Treat the missing review date as governance metadata cleanup, search for related tickets, and draft a concise FFS payload.

evals.prompt: Draft an engineering Jira ticket for adding audit logging to report transmissions.
evals.expected_behavior: Use emmy-jira-ticketing because the request is ordinary Jira drafting, not governance-driven follow-up.

evals.prompt: Review this Emmy governance page for approval readiness.
evals.expected_behavior: Use emmy-governance-doc-review because the user wants a document review, not a follow-up Jira ticket.
